description_long: This is a large, mobile construction crane with a bright blue exterior and a long telescopic boom mounted on a multi-axle wheeled chassis. The crane features a distinct operator cabin with transparent windows and red trim, positioned near the front of the vehicle. The boom is retracted and rests along the length of the chassis, with a visible mechanism at the end for lifting. The vehicle has eight wheels on each side, providing stability and mobility for urban construction tasks. The rear section appears to house machinery and possibly a counterweight, while the front is streamlined for road travel. The overall design is robust, with hard surfaces and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and durability.
description: A large blue mobile crane with a telescopic boom, multi-axle wheeled chassis, and a visible operator cabin. The boom is retracted and the vehicle is designed for heavy-duty urban construction tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue crane, the operator cabin, and all eight wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the chassis, the front bumper, and the boom aligned above the cabin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the boom, wheels, and rear machinery compartment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the boom, rear machinery, and the back of the chassis.
